      glpi_id: model.id,
      name: model.name,

  };
});

return items;

// Transform to cache format - storage uses "designation" field
const items = storage.map(disk => {
  return {
    json: {
      entity_type: 'storage',
      glpi_id: disk.id,
      name: disk.designation,
      normalized_name: disk.designation.toLowerCase().trim()
    }
  };
});

return items;
